_comment: Llavai Instagram post queue. status: draft (skipped) → ready (next --next picks it) → published. For images, set image_url to a PUBLIC url, e.g. https://www.llavai.com/social-assets/launch.jpg (put the file in /social-assets/, then commit+push so Vercel serves it). type: image | carousel | reel. Captions are seeded by Claude in Llavai's voice — edit freely.

items.alt_text: Llavai — Julia calls Barcelona estate agents in native Spanish within 60 seconds.
items.caption:
In Barcelona, the flat doesn't go to the best tenant. It goes to the fastest one.

You found the listing. You sent the message. By the time the agent read it, a dozen other people had already phoned.

Julia — Llavai's AI concierge — calls the agent in native Spanish within 60 seconds of a listing going live. While you're at work. While you're asleep. While everyone else is still typing.

Your first 5 calls are free.
→ llavai.com

#Barcelona #BarcelonaRentals #ExpatsInBarcelona #MovingToBarcelona #PisoEnBarcelona

items.alt_text: Stop losing flats to a language you're still learning — Llavai.
items.caption:
"Lo siento, ya está alquilado."

By the fourth time you hear it, you start to wonder if the flat was ever really available — or if your accent gave you away on the voicemail.

Julia doesn't have an accent. She's a native-Spanish AI that calls the agent the moment a flat appears, books the viewing, and sends you the recording so you know exactly what was said.

Stop losing flats to a language you're still learning.
→ llavai.com

#BarcelonaLife #ExpatLife #BarcelonaApartments #AlquilerBarcelona #RelocateToSpain

items.alt_text: How Llavai works: listing goes live, Julia calls in 60 seconds, viewing booked.
items.caption:
How it works, in three moves:

1. A flat that fits your search goes live.
2. Julia calls the agent in native Spanish — within 60 seconds.
3. You get the viewing, the recording, and the agent's reply, in your language.

No broken Spanish on a nervous phone call. No refreshing Idealista at midnight. Just the viewings, booked.

First 5 calls free → llavai.com

#Barcelona #BarcelonaHousing #DigitalNomadBarcelona #ExpatsInSpain #BcnRentals

items.alt_text: Llavai supports Ukrainian speakers searching for flats in Barcelona.
items.caption:
Шукаєте квартиру в Барселоні, але не розмовляєте іспанською?

Looking for a flat in Barcelona but don't speak Spanish? Julia calls the agent for you — in native Spanish, within 60 seconds of a listing going live — and sends you everything that was said, in your language.

Перші 5 дзвінків безкоштовно. Your first 5 calls are free.
→ llavai.com

#Барселона #УкраїнціВІспанії #Barcelona #UkrainiansInSpain #BarcelonaRentals
